outputSettings.description: outputSettings() returns the default OutputSettings instance when no setter called
outputSettings.expectedResult: return value is non-null and equals the document's initial outputSettings field

outputSettings.description: outputSettings() returns the newly set OutputSettings instance after setter invocation
outputSettings.expectedResult: return value is the same instance passed to outputSettings(OutputSettings)
